Settings
Manage company profile, payment accounts and app preferences
Companies
Each company has its own books, staff, customers, suppliers and accounts. Switch companies using the dropdown at the top of the sidebar.
Company Profile
Payment Accounts
Account Balances
Transfer History
Packing Wage Rates
Rate per pack packed, by product type. Used to auto-calculate team wages.
Trip Route Rates
Driver wage per trip by route/destination.

Payment accounts track where money goes when you receive a sale or invoice payment, and where money comes from when you pay an expense.


Every Sales record, Invoice payment, and Expense entry asks you to pick an account. This lets you see the balance of your cash drawer and each bank account at any time.


Types:

• Cash — physical cash, petty cash drawer

• Bank — current or savings account

• E-wallet — Touch 'n Go, Boost, GrabPay etc.

Opening Balances
Carry-forward balances from your prior books. Stored as dated dummy invoices (customers) and expenses (suppliers) on the cutoff date.
👥 Customers (they owe us)
🏭 Suppliers (we owe them)
Enter the balance owed as of cutoff date. Set to 0 to clear an existing opening balance. Negative balances (you owe customer / supplier owes you) need a credit note instead — use the regular Credit / Debit Notes UI.

Select a customer to see outstanding invoices
⇄ Record Inter-Company Shipment
Records a shipment from — to a sister company. Creates: a sales invoice in —, an inventory increment in the receiver, and matched inter-company entries on both sides.
Product Qty Unit Unit Price Line Total
Total —
📊 FX BOOKING RATE
Booked value: —
This is what will be reflected in your home-currency books.
⇄ Record Inter-Company Settlement
Records a money transfer between sister companies (e.g. SGD via Moolahgo → MYR). Closes off the inter-company balance built up by inter-co invoices.
FROM (sender) — —
TO (receiver) — —

Add User
📋 Workflow for new users:
  1. Save this user (with email filled in, Auth ID blank)
  2. Open Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Users → Add User
  3. Use the same email. Choose: send invite email or set password manually
  4. Copy the new user's UID, return here, click "🔗 Link Auth" on this user's row
✓ Linked to Supabase Auth. This user can log in with their email + password. Send reset email
